case_title: BOWNE OF LOS ANGELES, INC. VS BARNES, MERL O.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,980.54 FILED BY BOWNE OF LOS ANGELES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, MERL O. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, MERL O.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWNE OF LOS ANGELES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, MERL O. $1,980.54 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,019.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MERL BARNES RETURNED, PERSON DECEASED.
